title: Glass Flower Vase, 24cm Hight Modern Minimalist FlowerVase, Nordic Crystal Decorative Handmade Vase Flower Arrangement Decoration for Home Office Decor, Gift for Wedding Housewarming Party Celebrate
features: ⭐ High Quality Material: The crystal glass vase is made of colorful translucent lead-free glass, ensures safety, environmental protection and glamour. This glass vase with thickened glass is sturdy, durable, leak-proof and easy to clean.

⭐Unique & Mordern: With nordic style design and hand-blown handcraft, each of the vases is unique and attractive. A perfect contemporary art decoration for your home, kitchen, dining room, living room, bedroom, office, restaurant, flower shop etc.
⭐The Best Flower Vase: Simple and beautiful vase, perfect for bouquet fresh flower arrangements, branch roses, orchids, silk or dried flowers, and vase fillers.
⭐A Perfect Gift: As a big beautiful glass vase, it is a ideal gift for Christmas, Thanksgiving, housewarming, holiday, Mother's Day, birthday, wedding, anniversary, etc.

⭐Size & Packaging: 24 cm high, 13 cm in bottom diameter and 7.5 cm in top diameter. 5 colours available: clear, colourful, amber, grey,purple. The package contains only one vase, flowers are not included.
